dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8449 IH: Federal Diversity Jurisdiction Modernization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Lee of Florida introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 28, United States Code, to adjust the amount in controversy requirement for diversity cases, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Federal Diversity Jurisdiction Modernization Act of 2026.

section.header: Amendment to amount in controversy requirement

subsection.header: Amendment to title 28, united states code
subsection.text: Section 1332(a) of title 28, United States Code, is amended by striking $75,000 and inserting $500,000.
The amendment made by this section shall apply to any civil action commenced on or after the date of enactment of this Act.
